description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging the learner's ability to articulate CSS skills on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that motivates self‑assessment.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling, Best practices for styling and maintainability
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone preparing a technical résumé who wants to benchmark their CSS proficiency.
